english: above / up / at the top / upstairs
notes: Indicates a position that is higher up or at the top. Opposite of 'unten'. Can refer to physical location (upstairs, at the top) or figurative position (higher up in a hierarchy).

sentences.german: Die Bücher stehen oben im Regal.
sentences.english: The books are at the top of the shelf.

sentences.german: Meine Eltern wohnen oben, im dritten Stock.
sentences.english: My parents live upstairs, on the third floor.
